goal: Expose state graph tool-call status, argument, result, and relation metadata as machine-readable JSON without scraping the human tool report.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: Graph tool reports include tool calls, tool names, statuses, argument previews, result previews, and relation provenance, but CI and release scripts must parse human text to assert tool-call lineage.
